data.body: CI CAUGHT REAL ISSUE on 537/538 (Verified-1): df83 test's final assertion 'st_ino != stale_ino' fails on LINUX due to inode-number REUSE after unlink+recreate (macOS gave a new inode, Linux reuses). IMPORTANTLY the fresh lock still SURVIVED (exists+content assertions passed) - prod code's mtime re-check is the effective guard against inode-reuse, so prod is correct. Removed the OS-dependent inode assertion (change-detector). Squashed fix into df83 via --fixup+autosquash, all 4 Change-Ids intact. 538/540/541 inherited df83's failure (stacked). Re-pushing all 4.
